data.title: Will GameStop Buy More Bitcoin? Shares Plunge Amid 'Black Box' Criticism Over Strategy

data.title: Australia Securities and Investments Commission bans financial adviser over $9.6M crypto scam
data.description:
Australia Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) has banned a financial adviser for ten years over a crypto scam. In a recent media release, the regulator alleged that Glenda Maree Rogan misappropriated client funds with scam crypto investments. According to ASIC, Rogan transferred AU$14. 8 million (worth around US$9. 6 million) of clients’ funds to a crypto investment […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/australia-bans-financial-adviser-over-crypto/

data.title: Deutsche Telekom, Alibaba Cloud, Vodafone are running nodes on Nillion
data.description:
The Enterprise Cluster initiative enables decentralized use cases for privacy-sensitive operations across healthcare and finance.

data.title: ECB’s cycle of rate cuts is coming to an end
data.description:
The European Central Bank’s run of interest-rate cuts appears to be winding down, as inflation drifts back toward the ECB’s 2% goal and growth remains steady, Executive Board member Isabel Schnabel said Thursday in Brussels. Schnabel said the ECB’s cycle of rate reductions was drawing to a close now that “medium-term inflation is stabilizing around […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ecbs-cycle-of-rate-cuts-is-coming-to-an-end/

data.title: Tether Advances Its “Dual Pillar” Investment Strategy with $89M Stake in Elemental Altus
data.description:
The stablecoin issuer’s investment arm has taken a minority stake in Elemental Altus, a publicly listed precious metals investment company for C$121. 6 million ($89 million).
source: https://www.nftgators.com/tether-advances-its-dual-pillar-investment-strategy-with-89m-stake-in-elemental-altus/

data.title: Japanese game maker Gumi buys 80.352 BTC worth 1 billion yen
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japanese game maker Gumi announced that it has completed 1 billion yen (about 6.96 million US dollars) of Bitcoin purchases, a total of 80,352 Bitcoins, with an average price of 12,430,257 yen per Bitcoin. The company said it will continue to purchase Bitcoin in the future. (Tipranks)

data.title: Traders see two fed rate cuts this year
data.description:
Bond traders are now fully pricing in two rate cuts by the Federal Reserve this year after fresh data on producer prices and weekly jobless claims gave US Treasury markets a lift. On Thursday, Treasury prices climbed sharply across nearly all parts of the curve, pushing yields down six to seven basis points. This marks […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/traders-see-two-fed-rate-cuts-this-year/

data.title: Fears over Iran-Israel war are driving oil prices lower
data.description:
Crude oil futures slipped on Thursday, easing back after a sharp rally in the previous session driven by concerns that Israel and Iran could be on the verge of open conflict. By 11:15 a. m. Eastern Time, US West Texas Intermediate futures were down 54 cents, or 0. 8%, settling at $67. 61 a barrel. At the same […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/iran-israel-war-fears-oil-lower/

data.title: Meta Could Launch Private Currency With GENIUS Act Loophole, Say Senators
data.description:
TL;DR Meta is reportedly preparing to revive its plans for a private stablecoin, taking advantage of a legal gap in the recently passed GENIUS Act. Critical senators argue that the move could centralize even more financial power within a single tech company. Still, Meta’s renewed interest in digital assets represents a major step toward broader. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/meta-could-launch-private-currency-with-genius-act-loophole-say-senators/

data.title: China plans to drop all tariffs on African imports for new markets as it settles with Trump
data.description:
China has announced that it will remove the tariffs it charges on imports from all 53 African countries with which it has formal ties. The decision was made at a China-Africa co-operation meeting. When it goes into effect, the move to zero tariffs will be an extension of China’s deal last year to drop taxes […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-to-drop-all-tariffs-on-african-imports/

data.title: World Liberty promised AAVE lending six months ago — so where is it?
data.description:
Donald Trump-affiliated World Liberty Financial has yet to launch its AAVE instance six months after the governance vote approving it.
source: https://protos.com/trump-world-liberty-aave-missing/

data.title: XRP Ledger adopts USDC one week after Circle goes public
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/357946/xrp-ledger-adopts-usdc-one-week-after-circle-goes-public?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Binance’s BSC knocks Ethereum out of top spot in dApp volume rankings
data.description:
Binance's BNB Smart Chain is now the leading venue for decentralized apps, driven by the growth of PancakeSwap. Binance also grew its share of the centralized trading market, suggesting a bullish direction for crypto assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-bsc-leads-ethereum-dapp-volume/

data.title: US SEC Delays Approval of VanEck Avalanche ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: The U.S. SEC has delayed its decision on the approval of VanEck's spot Avalanche ETF.

data.title: BlackRock puts crypto assets at the core of its 2030 strategic vision
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BlackRock announced that it has included "becoming the world's largest crypto asset manager" as one of its 2030 vision priorities. Currently, its crypto asset management scale exceeds US$50 billion, covering ETF products such as IBIT and ETHA, and manages Circle's USDC reserves and the US$200 million BUIDL tokenized fund. (BitcoinMagazine)
